# Factory-X Business Models

> Structured methodology and tooling for developing data-driven business models
> in industrial contexts (Factory-X / Manufacturing-X ecosystem).
> Covers the House Building Logic (6-step framework), AI assistant "Estelle",
> and a 5-day workshop format. Default language: German. English version available.

## Methodology

- [Introduction to House Building Logic](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/overview): Overview of the HBL framework and how to use it
- [Entrance Area](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/entrance-area): Define the business idea, conduct market analysis, set strategic direction
- [Blue Room](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/blue-room): Understand customer needs – develop personas, pains, and gains
- [Red Room](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/red-room): Develop the value proposition – translate customer problems into concrete solutions
- [Green Room](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/green-room): Design value creation – plan partners, data flows, and operational implementation
- [Yellow Room](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/yellow-room): Validate economic viability – calculate costs, revenues, and pricing models
- [Exit Area](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/methodology/exit-room): Bundle results, assess risks, create a Go/Review/Stop decision proposal

## AI Assistant

- [Two Approaches Compared](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/ai/ai_approaches): Single Prompt File vs. Agentic Skills – when to use which
- [Single Prompt Guide](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/ai/single_prompt_guide): Setup guide for AI assistant Estelle (ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot)
- [Single Prompt Best Practices](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/ai/single_prompt_best_practices): Tips for working effectively with Estelle
- [Agentic Skills Overview](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/ai/agentic_skills): 23 specialized Claude Code skills for each HBL method
- [Today & Future](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/ai/present_and_future): What AI-assisted business model development can do now and in the future

## Optional

- [Workshop Overview](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/workshop/overview_workshop): 5-day design sprint concept for applying the House Building Logic with teams
- [Workshop Preparation](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/docs/workshop/preparation): Prerequisites and setup before the workshop
- [Blog](https://factory-x-contributions.github.io/business-models/blog): Updates and announcements about the project
